name: LED Outdoor Colour Changing Rope Lights – 100M – 1P65
description: This 100M colour-changing LED outdoor rope light is ideal for weddings, parties, hotels, malls, parks, and streets. It features 36 LEDs per meter, runs on 110V or 220V, and emits warm white light at 3500K with a high brightness of 1100 lm and efficiency of 155 lm/W. The light is dimmable, has a CRI of 90, and offers steady-on effects in multiple colors including red, yellow, blue, green, white, pink, and purple. Made from durable PVC with an IP65 rating, it’s suitable for both indoor and outdoor use. It operates in temperatures from -40°C to 60°C, lasts up to 50,000 hours, Comes with a 1-year warranty.
short_desc: Specifications: Length: 100m (36 LEDs/m) Voltage: 110V / 220V CCT: 3500K (Warm White) Luminous Flux: 1100 lm Efficiency: 155 lm/W CRI: 90 IP Rating: IP65 (Indoor/Outdoor use) Effect: Steady on Colors: Red, Yellow, Blue, Green, White, Pink, Purple Material: PVC, LED Dimmable: Yes Lifespan: 50,000 hours Temperature Range: -40°C to 60°C Certifications: CE, RoHS Applications: Weddings, Parties, Hotels, Malls, Parks, Streets Warranty: 1 Year
